mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO coupon_grant_task_user (id, task_id, user_id, username, phone, grant_status, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.taskId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.username}, #{item.phone}, #{item.grantStatus}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.deleted} )
